focus_points.label: Late arrivals — workload, commute, or something else?
focus_points.reason: Notes mention she is always late to work. Could be due to workload, commute issues, or something personal — worth clarifying to understand the underlying cause.

focus_points.label: Work in flight this cycle.
focus_points.reason: Standard bi-weekly anchor — she needs space to surface what she is actually working on, independent of the late-arrivals signal.

focus_points.label: What she'd want more of from you.
focus_points.reason: Bi-weekly hygiene at this seniority — the cleanest channel for her to redirect the relationship if something is off.
